verdict_reasoning: ATP5F1B is the ATP synthase F1 subunit beta, a core catalytic subunit of mitochondrial complex V (ATP synthase). The protein is assembled into the F1 catalytic core complex within the mitochondrial matrix and is stably integrated into the inner mitochondrial membrane as part of the Fo-F1 supercomplex. It does not have a transmembrane domain that spans to the outer leaflet and is not trafficked to or displayed on the plasma membrane. No documented cell-state-induced, tissue-restricted, lysosomal-exocytosis, or stable-surface-attachment mechanism applies. The protein is mitochondrial-internal.
